basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 266 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gujarat Gaun Seva Pasandgi Mandal (GSSSB), Gandhinagar
basic_details.department: Health and Family Welfare Department (Directorate of Medical Services, Gandhinagar)
basic_details.short_information: GSSSB is recruiting 266 Junior Pharmacist (Class-3) posts under the Health and Family Welfare Department, last date 25 June 2026.

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (Non-Refundable if absent; refundable if present)
application_fee.sc_fee: Rs. 400/- (Non-Refundable if absent; refundable if present)
application_fee.details: All candidates must pay the examination fee online only through OJAS website. Fee payment last date is 28-06-2026 (23:59 hrs). Fee paid by candidates who appear for the examination will be refunded. Fee will NOT be refunded if the candidate does not appear for the examination or if the application is rejected. Candidates must obtain and preserve the fee receipt/e-receipt.

age_limit.details: The candidate's age should not be less than 18 years and not more than 35 years as on 25-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government rules for various categories.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application (25-06-2026). Only Indian Citizens or those with nationality as per Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967 (Rule 7) are eligible to apply.
qualification.education_qualification: (i) Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy (B.Pharm) or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) from a recognized University/Institution; OR (ii) Diploma in Pharmacy from a recognized University/Institution with about 2 years experience as Junior Pharmacist in Government/Government Undertaking/Board or as Dispenser in hospital/dispensary or as Pharmacist/Medical Representative in a pharmaceutical company
qualification.nationality: Indian Citizen or as per Rule 7 of Gujarat Civil Services Classification and Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967.

vacancy_details.Eligible Disability Types: OL, BL, CP, LC, Dw, AAV, SD, SI (Without Neurological Dysfunction)

vacancy_details.Category: Autism, Intellectual, Specific Learning & Mental Illness (D & E)
vacancy_details.Eligible Disability Types: ASD (Mild), SLD (40–100%), MI (40–100%), MD (Multiple Disabilities from Groups B to D)

salary_details.pay_scale: Fixed Pay of Rs. 40,800/- per month for first 5 years; thereafter 7th Pay Commission Pay Scale Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5) on regularization

selection_process: Sr. Subject Marks
1 Logical Reasoning & Data Interpretation 30
2 Numerical / Mathematical Aptitude 30
3 Indian Constitution, Current Affairs, Gujarati & English Comprehension 30
Total (Part-A) 90
1 Questions related to the concerned subject (Pharmacy) and its applications 120
Total (Part-B) 120
Total Questions Total Marks Duration Negative Marking
210 (90 in Part-A + 120 in Part-B) 210 (90 + 120) 3 Hours (180 Minutes) – Combined for both parts 1/4 mark deducted for each wrong answer

Selection will be done through a single-stage Competitive Written Examination of objective-type MCQ (Multiple Choice Questions) conducted via CBRT (Computer Based Response Test) or OMR (Optical Mark Recognition) method. The question paper will consist of two parts – Part-A and Part-B.
Exam Pattern – Part A (General/Aptitude)
Exam Pattern – Part B (Subject Specific)
Qualifying Standard: Minimum 40% marks separately in both Part-A and Part-B is mandatory for all categories. No relaxation below 40% will be given to any category.
Scribe / Compensatory Time for PwBD: PwBD candidates with Benchmark Disability (as defined under The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act

2016) who have limitation in writing ability may avail scribe/compensatory time facility. Compensatory time of 20 minutes per hour of examination is allowed for eligible PwBD candidates. Requests must be submitted to GSSSB at least 2 days before the exam via email: [email protected] with required certificates.
Widow Candidates: Widow candidates who have not remarried will be awarded 5% bonus marks on total marks obtained in the written exam for priority in selection
subject to submission of required proof. If such proof is not produced
the 5% addition will be cancelled and merit redetermined.
Sports Candidates: Candidates who have represented at National/International
Inter-University
or All India School Games Federation level in recognized sports will be awarded 5% bonus marks on marks obtained in the written exam for priority in selection
subject to production of required certificates from competent authority.
how_to_apply: Only online applications will be accepted. No other mode of application will be entertained. Candidates should apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date.
Steps to Apply Online:
Visit the official OJAS website: https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in
Click on "Online Application" → Click on "Apply" → Select "GSSSB"
Select Advertisement No. 415/2026-27 – Junior Pharmacist, Class-3 and click "Apply Now"
Fill in Personal Details and Educational Details carefully (fields marked with * are mandatory)
Accept the declaration (Assurance) and click "Save" to generate the Application Number
Upload Photograph (5 cm × 3.6 cm, JPG, max 15 KB) and Signature (2.5 cm × 7.5 cm, JPG, max 15 KB)
Click "Confirm Application" after verifying all details. Once confirmed, no changes can be made
Note the Confirmation Number generated after confirmation – preserve it for all future correspondence
Pay examination fee online via Debit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or Wallet before 28-06-2026
Download and print the application form and preserve it till the entire recruitment process is complete

Important: If multiple applications are submitted, only the last confirmed application will be considered valid; remaining applications will be cancelled. Fee paid for cancelled applications will not be refunded.
Documents to be Produced at Certificate Verification / Appointment:
Educational qualification certificates and marksheets (Pharmacy Degree/Diploma onwards)
School Leaving Certificate (for date of birth proof)
Caste/Category certificate in prescribed Government format (for SC/ST/SEBC/EWS candidates)
Non-Creamy Layer certificate (for SEBC candidates) – obtained between 01-04-2024 and 25-06-2026
Income and Asset certificate (for EWS candidates) – obtained between 26-06-2023 and 25-06-2026
Disability Certificate in prescribed format (Form V, VI, VII under Rights of Persons with Disabilities Rules, 2017) for PwBD candidates
Discharge Book and Identity Card issued by competent authority (for Ex-Servicemen)
Sports certificate in prescribed format from competent authority (if applicable)
Widow certificate and proof of non-remarriage (if applicable)
Computer knowledge certificate/marksheet (if not included in qualifying degree)
Photograph (same as uploaded in application form – multiple copies required)
Apply Online at: https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in
For queries, contact GSSSB office at Phone No.: 079-23258916 (regarding educational qualification, age limit, online application, and fee payment).
important_instructions: Reservation for reserved categories is applicable only to candidates originally domiciled in Gujarat (Mool Gujarat). OBC/SEBC candidates from the Creamy Layer are NOT entitled to reservation benefits; they must apply as General (UR) candidates. Category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed after confirmation. Candidates must ensure the correct category is entered before confirming. Candidates with foreign university degrees must produce equivalence/recognition documents from UGC at the time of certificate verification. Candidates must keep their registered mobile number and email ID active throughout the entire recruitment process; exam-related communication including Admit Cards will be sent via SMS/email. The photograph uploaded in the application must be recent (not older than 1 year from the last date of application) with a white background and the date of photograph printed on it. Multiple copies of the same photograph must be kept for use at all stages. Candidates found guilty of impersonation, submission of false/forged documents, use of unfair means, canvassing, or any misconduct will be disqualified from this and future examinations, and may be permanently barred from Government service. The Gujarat Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2023 is applicable to all GSSSB competitive examinations. Any candidate found violating its provisions will face legal action. Passing the competitive examination does not automatically entitle a candidate to appointment. The appointing authority must be satisfied about the candidate's suitability in all respects. Appointed candidates will be required to undergo training as per Government rules and pass the training examination. GSSSB reserves the right to modify or cancel the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. All recruitment-related updates, corrigendum, and notices will be published only on https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in – candidates must check the website regularly. Candidates must appear for the examination at their own cost; no travel expenses will be reimbursed. Legal jurisdiction for any dispute arising out of this recruitment shall be Gandhinagar/Gujarat only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 266 vacancies have been announced for the post of Junior Pharmacist (Class-3) under the Health and Family Welfare Department, Government of Gujarat.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 25-06-2026 (up to 23:59 hrs). The last date for fee payment is 28-06-2026 (up to 23:59 hrs).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess either a Bachelor's degree in Pharmacy (B.Pharm) or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) from a recognized university, OR a Diploma in Pharmacy with approximately 2 years of relevant experience as a pharmacist/dispenser in a government hospital, undertaking, or pharmaceutical company.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years as on 25-06-2026. Age relaxation is available for women, reserved categories (SC/ST/SEBC/EWS), PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen as per Government of Gujarat rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Class-3?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed on a fixed pay of Rs. 40,800/- per month for the first 5 years. After 5 years, on satisfactory performance, they will be regularized in the 7th Pay Commission Pay Scale of Rs. 29,200/- to Rs. 92,300/- (Level-5).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist 2026?
faq.answer: The examination fee is Rs. 500/- for General (UR) candidates and Rs. 400/- for Reserved category candidates (all category women, SEBC, SC, ST, EWS, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen). Fee is refundable to candidates who appear for the examination.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The exam is a single-stage MCQ-based competitive written test (CBRT/OMR) consisting of two parts: Part-A (90 marks – General Aptitude) and Part-B (120 marks – Pharmacy subject). Total 210 questions, 3 hours duration, with 1/4 negative marking for wrong answers.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any minimum qualifying marks required in the GSSSB Junior Pharmacist exam?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must score a minimum of 40% marks separately in both Part-A and Part-B. No relaxation below 40% will be granted to any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply for GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online only through the OJAS portal at https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in between 06-06-2026 (14:00 hrs) and 25-06-2026 (23:59 hrs). No offline applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Is GSSSB Junior Pharmacist Recruitment 2026 only for Gujarat domicile candidates?
faq.answer: Reservation benefits (age relaxation and reserved category seats) are applicable only to candidates originally domiciled in Gujarat (Mool Gujarat). However, any Indian citizen fulfilling the eligibility criteria may apply for the unreserved posts.
